name: Matcha
description: Single-origin Uji leaves, stone-milled at dawn. A vegetal hush of umami, finished with cold oat cream.

name: Yuzu
description: Hand-zested Kōchi yuzu, sparkling spring water, a whisper of honey. Bright, electric, alive.

name: Sakura
description: Salt-cured Yoshino petals steeped in spring milk. Floral, faintly almond, undeniably spring.

name: Hojicha
description: Charcoal-roasted Kyoto leaves. Toasted hazelnut, caramelized sugar, the warmth of a kettle at dusk.

name: Ube
description: Purple yam slow-steamed with coconut cream. Earthy, silken, with a quiet vanilla finish.
